overview: A dark-themed web agency template featuring a double carousel hero, bento-grid services, portfolio with modal previews and full detail pages, team, testimonials, FAQ, and a contact form that persists submissions.
features: Double carousel hero section with animated panels and CTA
Bento-grid services section with hover animations
Portfolio grid with modal preview and full project detail pages
Category filters for portfolio with URL state persistence
Contact form with backend submission storage
Team, testimonials carousel, and FAQ accordion sections
